If you are referring to a plant with bupleurifolius, Bupleurum is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as Bupleurum. Bupleurum is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits.

The health benefits of Bupleurum include its use in treating fever, headache, and rheumatism. It is also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties.

The bioactive constituents of Bupleurum include saikosaponins, saponins, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Bupleurum include tea, tincture, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
